product_updates.title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
product_updates.content: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.

product_updates.title: Jensen Huang just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
product_updates.content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said he expects $1 trillion worth of orders for the chips.

product_updates.title: Warren presses Pentagon over decision to grant xAI access to classified networks
product_updates.content: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk.

product_updates.title: Memories AI is building the visual memory layer for wearables and robotics
product_updates.content: Memories.ai is building a large visual memory model that can index and retrieve video-recorded memories for physical AI.

product_updates.title: Elon Musk’s xAI faces child porn lawsuit from minors Grok allegedly undressed
product_updates.content: The three plaintiffs are seeking to represent anyone who had real images of them as a minor altered into sexual content by Grok.

product_updates.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 uses generative AI to boost photorealism in video games, with ambitions beyond gaming
product_updates.content: Nvidia’s new DLSS 5 uses generative AI and structured graphics data to make video games more realistic. CEO Jensen Huang says the approach could eventually spread to other industries.

product_updates.title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
product_updates.content: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of computing and AI.

product_updates.title: Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn: Frore hits $1.64B
product_updates.content: At Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's urging, Frore developed liquid-cooling tech for chips. That shift helped it raise $143 million.

product_updates.title: Fuse raises $25M to disrupt aging loan origination systems used by US credit unions
product_updates.content: The startup also announced a $5 million "rescue fund" to help credit unions ditch legacy software for its AI-native platform.

product_updates.title: The dictionary sues OpenAI
product_updates.content: Encyclopedia Britannica and Merriam-Webster say that OpenAI violated the copyright of almost 100,000 articles by using them for LLM training.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Nurturing agentic AI beyond the toddler stage
technical_breakthroughs.content: Parents of young children face a lot of fears about developmental milestones, from infancy through adulthood.
